Up to 5 years in prison, a fine, or both. This is specifically for pretending to be a bank official, police, or relative.
General forgery is punishable by up to two years imprisonment, a fine, or both. Serious forgery, such as with intent to cheat, can lead to seven years imprisonment.
If the scam is part of a syndicate (a gang), the punishment is a minimum of 5 years, which can extend to life imprisonment, with a fine of at least ₹5 lakh.
